reviews.comment:
Llegamos para comprar agua caliente andabamos con lo justo y el vuelto nos quisieron dar caramelos, al decirle que no comemos caramelos no el pibe nos dijo que no nos vendia agua, nos pusimos a tomar mate y nos dijieron que no podiamos, cuando vimos muchas persona tomando mate, muy mala onda esa persona.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived to buy hot water, we were short on cash and they tried to give us candy as change. When we told them we didn't eat candy, the kid said he wouldn't sell us water. We started drinking mate and they told us we couldn't, even though we saw many other people drinking mate. That person was really rude.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Miguel. El agua del termo también se puede pagar con QR con cualquier billetera virtual y no  no se puede tomar mates en nuestras mesas
